subcodes.first_line: O thou who seekest after the Kingdom! Place thy hope in the bounties of God and let not the dire adversities of this world dismay thee.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب ملکوت بالطاف حضرت پروردگار امیدوار باش و از مصائب شدیده اینجهان نومید
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
